LanguageData.RobCo_ExterminatorFlamer.label: exterminator flamer
LanguageData.RobCo_ExterminatorFlamer.description: Expends a charge to spray an extended-range incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_NapalmFlamer.label: napalm flamer
LanguageData.RobCo_NapalmFlamer.description: Expends a napalm charge to spray an incendiary burst.
